## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Verification

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make app`
- [ ] I tested the affected workflow on macOS
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation or the changelog when needed
- [ ] This change contains no vault files, keys, credentials, or private records

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for visible UI changes, or write “Not applicable.”
